title: Basic JavaScript Scope and Closures
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Scope and Closures. Focus on implementing Global scope correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Scope and Closures
description: Create a function that uses Global scope and Function scope together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Scope and Closures Project
description: Build a small application that applies Global scope, Function scope, Block scope (let/const) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Scope and Closures
description: The following code has bugs related to Global scope. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Scope and Closures
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Global scope and Function scope.
